qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig oi_condic_pelig, ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.c_condic_pelig c_condic_pelig, ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.d_condic_pelig d_condic_pelig FROM ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG ORDER BY ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.CondicionesPeligrosas.CONDIC_PELIG\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig oi_condic_pelig FROM ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG ORDER BY ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.CondicionesPeligrosas.CONDIC_PELIG\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.CondicionesPeligrosas.CONDIC_PELIG.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Accidentabilidad.CondicionesPeligrosas.CONDIC_PELIG.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig) as CNT from ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.oi_condic_pelig={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.d_condic_pelig,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ACC04_CONDIC_PELIG.c_condic_pelig,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
